description_long: This is a utilitarian metal-framed chaise with a minimalist, industrial design, featuring a tubular steel structure painted in a dark, matte finish. The frame consists of two arched headboards at either end, each with vertical and horizontal support bars, providing both stability and a simple aesthetic. The sleeping surface is covered with a dark, slightly textured mattress that appears to be medium thickness, accompanied by two matching pillows placed at one end. The overall construction suggests durability and ease of maintenance, making it suitable for public or institutional urban environments such as shelters, hostels, or temporary accommodations. The legs are straight and cylindrical, seamlessly integrated into the frame, and the entire piece sits low to the ground. The absence of decorative elements or embellishments emphasizes its functional, no-nonsense character.
description: A sturdy, industrial-style metal chaise with a dark tubular frame, simple arched headboards, and a dark mattress with two pillows. Its utilitarian design is ideal for urban or institutional settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the chaise, both arched headboards, and the mattress with two pillows on the right side.
description_view_1: End view highlights the arched headboard, vertical support bars, and the thickness of the mattress and pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the opposite side of the chaise, with the pillows now on the left, and the same arched headboards and frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite end view shows the headboard and the arrangement of the pillows and mattress from the other side.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest consists of a simple, arched tubular steel frame with vertical and horizontal support bars, matching the headboard at both ends. It is unadorned, with no tufting, cutouts, or decorative elements, and rises to a moderate height above the mattress.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present; the sides are open with only the headboard and footboard providing structure.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, cylindrical, and made of the same tubular steel as the frame, with a matte dark finish and no decorative features. They are integrated into the corners of the frame for stability.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid in color, with a dark, slightly textured fabric that appears uniform and unpatterned. There are no visible tufting, quilting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two rectangular pillows placed side by side at one end of the chaise, resting on top of a single, full-length mattress. Both the mattress and pillows are loose and not attached to the frame.
